activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference
EU origin normalization and matching rules

rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - consignor name found in invoice header and address block
MATCH - exact match of company name after normalization

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Ekman & Co AB' from certificate matches exactly the invoice issuer's name and address, both indicating Sweden as country. Verified by direct name string presence and country match with allowed normalization.

rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - consignee (Sold To) matches name in invoice
MATCH - allowed normalization of address abbreviation and full word 'Limited'

consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li' matches invoice 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited' with accepted commercial abbreviation normalization. Country India matches exactly.

rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - general goods description allowed due to invoice reference and date verification

goods_description.motivation: Certificate states goods description 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240' that matches exactly the invoice goods description and invoice reference no. 46188985 which matches invoice number and date, allowing acceptance of general description rule.

rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - exact numeric value and unit identified in invoice after normalization of whitespace and separator

quantity.motivation: Gross Weight quantity in certificate '25 650 KGS' can be identified in the invoice as 'Gross Weight: 25 650 KGS' after allowed normalization of spacing and number formatting.

rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - origin explicitly stated in invoice as 'Swedish origin'
MATCH - EU origin normalization applied, certificate states 'European Union' and invoice confirms 'Swedish origin'

origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'Sweden' matches invoice statement that goods are of Swedish origin. The presence of 'European Union' in certificate and invoice confirmation of Swedish origin fulfills EU normalization and origin matching rules.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) are identified and match exactly or via allowed normalization without any contradictions, allowing automatic approval.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollerade uppgifter från certifikatet kan tydligt verifieras i fakturan utan avvikelser. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland stämmer överens. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
